name: Nike
summary: Nike achieved a F (31.1/100) due to their explicit performance across our three pillars. In Planet, they fall behind with 25.7/100 due to a severe lack of verifiable environmental or material transparency commitments. In People, they score a concerning 39.4/100, indicating severe gaps in verified supplier audits or significant government red flags (OSHA/CBP violations). Finally, in Animals, they score 25.0/100 because of an absence of strict public animal welfare commitments or certified raw material tracking.

ktc.name: KnowTheChain Benchmark
ktc.publisher: KnowTheChain / Business & Human Rights Resource Centre
ktc.context: Ranked 6th (48/100). Above average but did not reach the 50-point threshold.
